summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuildMap Vibe Coding experience. Backend APIs working perfectly (16/16 tests passed), but frontend authentication flow has critical issues preventing proper navigation to dashboard and project pages.

ui_bugs.issue: Authentication successful but not redirecting to dashboard - stuck on login page
Protected routes not properly recognizing authenticated state

integration_issues.issue: User remains on login page after successful authentication
Cannot test Vibe Coding features due to authentication navigation issues

passed_tests: Conversation analysis API with Arabic stages
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend authentication flow. The AuthContext is not properly handling authentication state after successful login. User gets stuck on login page despite successful backend authentication. This prevents testing of all Vibe Coding features including progress bar, quick suggestions, project summary panel, chat interface, and files preview.
